name: send_broadcast
description: Create and optionally schedule a broadcast email to your subscribers. Supports HTML content, subject lines, and audience filtering.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The HTML body content of the broadcast email.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Internal description of the broadcast for your reference.

parameters.name: public
parameters.description: Whether the broadcast should be publicly visible on your profile.

parameters.name: published_at
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule sending. Omit to save as draft.

parameters.name: send_to_unconfirmed
parameters.description: Whether to send to unconfirmed subscribers. Defaults to false.
